revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Kingdom of England]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Kingdom of England]]</includeonly>

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Kingdom of England | shortname alias = England | flag alias = Flag of England.svg | flag alias-anglo-saxon = FlagOfWessex.svg | flag alias-1198 = Royal Banner of England.svg | flag alias-1340 = Royal Standard of England (1411-1553-1559-1603).svg | flag alias-1395 = Royal Standard of England (1395–1399).svg | flag alias-1406 = Royal standard of England (1406–1603).svg | flag alias-1554 = Royal Standard of England (1554–1558).svg | flag alias-blue = English Blue Ensign 1620.svg | flag alias-white = English White Ensign 1620.svg | flag alias-naval = English Red Ensign 1620.svg | link alias-naval = Royal Navy | link alias-army = English Army | flag alias-navy = English Red Ensign 1620.svg | link alias-navy = Royal Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = anglo-saxon | var2 = 1198 | var3 = 1340 | var4 = 1395 | var5 = 1406 | var6 = 1554 | var7 = blue | var8 = white | related1 = England | related2 = Danelaw | related3 = North Sea Empire | cat = England kingdom </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
